# MaKe Spaces

> MaKe Spaces is a boutique retail consultancy and placemaking agency based in Kuala Lumpur, Malaysia.

## What We Do

We help F&B, wellness, fitness, and lifestyle brands find and secure the right retail spaces in Klang Valley, Malaysia. On the developer side, we help curate retail environments that draw the right tenants and turn properties into destinations.

## Services

- Retail space matching and placement for tenants
- Tenant mix curation for developers and landlords
- Placemaking and destination strategy
- Adaptive reuse of commercial spaces
- Space programming and retail activation
- Lease negotiation advisory

## Who We Work With

### Tenants / Brands
F&B outlets, wellness studios, fitness concepts, lifestyle brands, fashion retailers, and beauty businesses looking for shoplot or retail space in Kuala Lumpur, Petaling Jaya, and Klang Valley.

### Developers / Landlords
Mall operators, mixed-use developers, and retail podium owners looking to attract quality tenants and activate their spaces. Current partners include YTL, GuocoLand, IOI Properties, Hap Seng Land, UOA Group, Paramount, Quill Citymall, EXSIM, Triterra, and LGB Group.

## Locations We Operate In

- Kuala Lumpur (KL)
- Petaling Jaya (PJ)
- Klang Valley
- Sentul Depot
- The MET
- The Five
- Plaza Conlay
- Expanding to Johor and Singapore

## Featured Brand Placements

- Grumpy Bagels — F&B at Sentul Depot
- Tjufy — Experience at The Five
- Niko Neko — F&B at The MET
- Lachér Patisserie — F&B at The MET
- The Ivory Bridal — Fashion at The MET
- Lachér Coffee — F&B at Plaza Conlay
- Pickle Depot — Wellness at Sentul Depot
- OR Gelato — F&B at The MET
- Freia Aesthetics — Wellness at The Five
